locked.coi_flag: Federal loans/subsidies required. Trump family ownership creates potential preferential treatment risk vs. competing startups.

barriers.title: Tritium Scarcity
barriers.detail: ~25kg global supply. Lithium blanket breeding unproven at commercial scale.

barriers.title: Materials Degradation
barriers.detail: Neutron bombardment degrades structural components faster than fission. No material validated for full commercial duty cycle. EU €340M research program launched Jan 2026.

barriers.title: Timeline Slippage History
barriers.detail: ITER over $22B and years behind. Fusion timelines have historically slipped by 5-10 years across all major programs.

barriers.title: Net Energy Positive at Grid Scale
barriers.detail: NIF achieved ignition in 2022 but energy output was laser-input dependent. Commercial energy positive remains undemonstrated at utility scale.

milestone_banner.text: KSTAR achieved 100 million degree ion temperature in May 2026 following its 102-second plasma record, while Helion's Polaris reached 150 million degrees in February and EAST exceeded the Greenwald density limit in January 2026.

kstar.name: KSTAR
kstar.description: KSTAR achieves ion temperature of 100 million degrees in May 2026 following 102-second plasma record. Operating in tungsten environment with ongoing experiments targeting 300-second operation at 100 million degrees.

cfs.name: Commonwealth Fusion
cfs.description: CFS partnered with Nvidia and Siemens to develop an AI-powered digital twin for SPARC, while delivering the first production magnet for reactor assembly. SPARC construction progresses toward 2027 first plasma as ARC commercial plant planning advances in Virginia.

helion.name: Helion Energy
helion.description: Polaris continues development following February 2026 temperature milestone of 150 million degrees. Scientific American profiling Helion's technology readiness as company advances toward 2028 commercial power target.

tae.name: TAE Technologies / TMTG
tae.description: TAE-Trump Media $6B all-stock merger continues SEC S-4 review with mid-2026 close target. TMTG interim CEO pursuing Truth Social spinout as separate listed entity while TAE combination advances.

iter.name: ITER
iter.description: ITER launches Private Sector Fusion Engagement Project to deepen industry collaboration. US completed final central solenoid deliveries and French regulator exempted vacuum vessel from fission-based rules, streamlining assembly.

east.name: EAST / China Program
east.description: EAST tokamak exceeded the Greenwald density limit in January 2026, achieving plasma densities previously considered theoretically impossible. This breakthrough solidifies China's position alongside KSTAR as a leader in sustained high-density plasma research.

timeline.title: Merger Announced
timeline.detail: All-stock deal signed. Boards approved. DJT stock +33% on day of.

timeline.title: $200M Cash to TAE at Signing
timeline.detail: Additional $100M available on SEC Form S-4 filing.

timeline.title: Shareholder + Regulatory Close
timeline.detail: SEC S-4 review ongoing. TMTG considering Truth Social spinout into separate listed company. Trump Jr. joins board. Mid-2026 close target intact.

timeline.title: Plant Site Selection Begins
timeline.detail: Nunes stated site search begins after deal closes.

timeline.title: First Power Generation Target
timeline.detail: TAE's stated goal for first electricity from utility-scale plant.

dynamic.auto_update_summary: Auto-updated 6/6 companies via Claude + RSS. Locked fields unchanged.
